| | | Team - The attacks against Ed are relentless. Here's what we're up against:

> 1\. Fox News and right-wing media stars like Tucker Carlson and Sean Hannity went absolutely berserk on their shows **attacking Ed 's bold, progressive vision to combat climate change**.
>
> 2\. The GOP establishment brought back disgraced lobbyist Jack Abramoff to **launch a dark money super PAC to attack Ed.**
>
> 3\. The right-wing Club for Growth launched **a vicious attack ad against Ed.**
>
> 4\. The Koch brothers and Karl Rove's group American Action Forum went on a **massive misinformation campaign against Ed.**
>
> 5\. Conservative Congressman Rob Bishop said Ed's Green New Deal resolution is **' tantamount to genocide.'**
>
> 6\. Mitch McConnell held a sham vote in the Senate against the Green New Deal to **appease Big Oil and the Koch brothers.**
>
> 7\. And Republican Senator Mike Lee took to the Senate floor to **mock climate change and the Green New Deal** while lives are lost due to unprecedented flooding in the midwest and people are still rebuilding from major disasters across the country.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: TODAY IS THE DAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Hello all, Thank you for your support. It’s been an amazing week! I am writing this from Washington D.C. where we are gearing up for our CNN Town Hall **TONIGHT at 7pm EST.** There is a lot in this email but I promise if you read the whole thing it will be worth it! There are now over 150 watch parties around the country – **[you can go here to join one near you.](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=RDcZDUOB5xo0RLGZuMRMKuy71yI4-Z4eON-umtEeArGgtHCxD2LADubRUJoJ0n8H&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=1)** Imagine watching the Town Hall with a bunch of Yang Gang members; my favorite thing about this campaign is the people it attracts. It’s been a lot of fun seeing all of the friendships and connections generated over the past weeks. This week we had our Humanity First rally in Boston that I’ve been calling the Boston Yang Party – over 1,000 people came out. It was a blast. And as usual the Boston press covered it. We’ve got another rally coming up in [**Washington D.C. on Monday**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdikqgOEmv95as43Y58cghfW4wyzyyuiqaLg38KK2ZimB1vnKEHqbG406dmxwHlePo_xZ21LyxwAppxZH0b3iyA&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=2) with over 2,200 people RSVPed! From there it’s on to Atlanta on Thursday and then Los Angeles on Monday. Rallies may be the most fun part of the campaign. The more people that come out the more people will catch on that we are the campaign to beat in 2020. Our national press push continues to work. I was on Fox and Friends this Friday, and CNN, USA Today, and TMZ each had a story on our campaign. Shout out to our Press Secretary, Madalin Sammons, for doing such outstanding work. Maddie joined us from the Richard Ojeda campaign. For anything we do on the campaign team, we are routinely outshone by our supporters’ creativity. There are thousands of memes that are hilarious and spread real information. There are even people who have made short films or created art about the campaign - like this [promo video](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbSmoxfDyv2OTZ5YWUsHiqs&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=3), [a new Yang Gang anthem](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRagY_wxw1pyWXz6gGsCMfr1&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=4), and even [Ronny Chieng did a bit on Jimmy Fallon](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRaOxbw0up_ybHq-soWWB4yj&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=5). That’s when this campaign really takes off – when you all make it your own. Seeing memes and art and videos made about you and your ideas is not only fun – it’s inspiring. I have been getting stronger every day as you build us up and spread the word. Please do keep it up. The more you do, the stronger we get. **MOST IMPORTANTLY** – Our CNN Town Hall tonight is a golden opportunity for our campaign to make some new friends. You can watch on any cable provider or stream live on [CNN Go.](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=hzFou0Mjz2URvHIBwLpjzZxejU81Pa02vPCvNGmjCDEwBSaIAgdRDZctrv1bE7Kk&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=6) Here's everything you need to know:
## 1\. HELP US TREND
_Use the hashtags**#YangTownHall** and **#CNNTownHall** all day. Start right now. Get your friends to join, especially those at watch parties. Do coordinated Tweet storms and let's be a presence on the Internet all day._
## 2\. POST PICTURES
_Wherever you watch, make sure you post pictures and videos of you and/or your crowd to our hashtags. We'll do our best to retweet them. Please send them to[yang2020content@gmail.com](mailto:yang2020content@gmail.com) to make it into a campaign video._
## **3\. WELCOME NEW YANG GANG MEMBERS**
_At minimum, half a million people will be introduced to our campaign tonight...and you KNOW they're gonna have questions. We made this easy for you –_**[ _here's a ton of content to share as we welcome our growing Yang Gang._](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=9g-hQKRcSqWoOTpvxkNQH93r2tGYCR64PWuONiFqWMGUAuwPeCFCSejjPkbUammby-L5qHFy4wsrLTUHBfHaaL8zpeeaKsWuK3HyqmwNY5k&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=7)**
## **4\. PREP FOR OUR POST-TOWN HALL MONEYBOMB**
_We're going to post a head-turning fundraising number in the 24 hours after the Town Hall. Will need your help, hope you're ready :)_ Lastly, for those of you that made it to the bottom of this email...**[check out our new hype video.](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZR2JMnd8fcAiUyvA9B6hBG&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=8)** Your pumped up candidate, \- Andrew
---

[ DONATE $10](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jXS7z6B0vQBSFYMqiqGORLM&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=9)

[ DONATE $20](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jdWXtiYd7YoTmFcK-0i3r20&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=10)

[ DONATE $50](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jaBNWLsD3frblJj2FiCYkZw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=11)

**Can you make a donation today?**

Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.

**Join the Yang Gang!**

If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application [here](https://my.yang2020.com/yang_gang_app?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=12) and someone from our team will reach out.

|
---
Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality.

[Yang2020.com](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=c5dAo5qulKAncvNYjq2uGSZwl_jDGybFpG2O3zBACL4&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=13) | [Twitter](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TqE6xdNTSVfW5RhtXxhMjJ0&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=14) | [Facebook](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iem_nK8ycftXP-O5PmREpZFFJK2fNzInyXSvMk1KZmg&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=15) | [Instagram](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y48vYg4fs9ZaLi2ukqvLwvJQL5wg0UiTTe5otEcf4_Y3&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=16)

Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang.

All rights reserved.
New York, NY
#HumanityFirst

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://my.yang2020.com/unsubscribe?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=town_hall_day&n=17).

name: petition@protectvoting.org
subject: need you to send McConnell a LOUD and CLEAR message →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Friends--the Voter Protection Project is proud to endorse HR1, landmark legislation introduced by House Democrats to promote voting rights and reform campaign finance law. HR1 will: - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0786/72412298/44a38fa9/6100abfb/1933650081/VEsH/ "https://www.paction.us/hr1_senate/vpp?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_AQ_EN_190414_HR1_U1_X2&source=VPP_AQ_EN_190414_HR1_U1_X2") Friends -- The Voter Protection Project is proud to endorse HR1, **landmark legislation introduced by House Democrats to promote voting rights and reform campaign finance law.** HR 1 will: -> Limit foreign influence in our elections
-> Make it ILLEGAL to mislead voters
-> Institute more secure methods for casting ballots
-> Make Election Day a federal holiday and voter registration easier Simply put: HR1 is good for America, and essential to the maintenance of free and fair elections. **Legislation like HR1 is what VPP is all about.** But Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell is _**refusing**_ to hold a vote for HR1. He's using dirty tricks to prevent Congress from passing these sweeping reforms... **because he 's fine with a system that oppresses the voice of the majority.** **[Can you sign this petition to support HR1 and DEMAND that Mitch McConnell schedule a vote immediately?>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0786/72412298/44a38fa9/6100abfa/1933650081/VEsE/ "https://www.paction.us/hr1_senate/vpp?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+sign+this+petition+to+support+HR&utm_campaign=VPP_AQ_EN_190414_HR1_U1_X2&source=VPP_AQ_EN_190414_HR1_U1_X2")** Mitch McConnell is running the Senate like a dictatorship. By preventing a vote on the Senate floor, he's drowning out the voices of the very people who would benefit from this crucial piece of legislation. **[We need to send a message to McConnell loud and clear -- it's time the Senate votes on HR1 >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0786/72412298/44a38fa9/6100abfd/1933650081/VEsF/ "https://www.paction.us/hr1_senate/vpp?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+We+need+to+send+a+message+to+McConnell+l&utm_campaign=VPP_AQ_EN_190414_HR1_U1_X2&source=VPP_AQ_EN_190414_HR1_U1_X2")** | | | [Sign on >> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0786/72412298/44a38fa9/6100abfc/1933650081/VEsC/ "https://www.paction.us/hr1_senate/vpp?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Sign+on+gtgt+&utm_campaign=VPP_AQ_EN_190414_HR1_U1_X2&source=VPP_AQ_EN_190414_HR1_U1_X2")

\-- Voter Protection Project

Our movement isn't funded by federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or fat checks scooped up from big donors at private fundraising events.

Instead, people like you are chipping in a little at a time to help build something big.

And we couldn't be more grateful.

**[But we'll also be honest: We're slightly behind where we need to be by the middle of the month (tomorrow) to stay on pace to hit our new April goal.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f309/45c30650/b0b9858f/6694a5a3/1500319289/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDE0ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190414em1-full")**

Just 84 contributions from Pennsylvania could help us get back on track -- can you be one of the 84? This is how we'll keep building a presidential campaign while showing we can get big money out of politics.

Every single donation is another sign that our grassroots movement is ready to dream big, fight hard, and win. And every single donation brings us closer to our goal.

These fundraising goals -- tracked by the quarter, month, week, and day -- determine our budget, and help decide the kinds of investments we can keep making.

And by investing in organizing person to person and face to face across the country, we can keep building a movement to make Washington work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

**But large grassroots campaigns like ours take real resources and early, sustained investments -- the kind that takes months, builds momentum over time, and can't be replaced by flashy last-minute TV ads.**

**[We truly can't do this without you. Make one of the 84 donations we need from Pennsylvania to help us get back on track to hit our April goal.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f309/45c30650/b0b9858f/6694a5a3/1500319289/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDE0ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190414em1-full")**

name: Kamala Organizing HQ
subject: Do you have plans on April 22?
body:
Howdy! My name’s Jose and I’m the Digital Organizing Director for Kamala’s
historic campaign for president. To explain my job a little: it’s my
team’s mission to empower you and hundreds of thousands of Kamala’s
supporters to get involved with our campaign -- no matter where you live
or whether you’ve volunteered for a campaign before.

Building a powerful grassroots network of volunteers will make all the
difference in this race. If we’re going to cut through the noise of this
crowded primary and elect Kamala the next President of the United States,
we need to start taking direct action -- and that starts now.

Our first major organizing opportunity is coming up in just a few days,
and I’m really excited to invite you to be a part of it! We need as many
people as possible to sign up to host watch parties for Kamala’s upcoming
CNN town hall on Monday, April 22.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/cnn-watch-party?refcode=ema190414-full&source=ema190414-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1001&akid=4341%2E5755789%2EvdnKVq ]Click here to sign up to host a watch party for Kamala’s CNN town hall,
and our team will send you all the information you need to host a
successful event.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/cnn-watch-party?refcode=ema190414-full&source=ema190414-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1002&akid=4341%2E5755789%2EvdnKVq ]Host a watch party

The upcoming CNN town hall will give millions of Americans the chance to
learn more about Kamala and hear more about her vision of a government
that works for ALL people.

This is our moment to show Kamala we’re in her corner. At watch parties
across the country, supporters will get together to root for Kamala. Then,
we’ll empower you with the tools you’ll need to start building a network
of supporters in your community to elect Kamala.

Whether this is your first-ever campaign or you’ve been volunteering for
years, it’s easy to host a successful watch party. And our team will be
available to help you with any questions you might have along the way.

We’re counting on grassroots supporters just like you to help us build our
movement -- one that is inclusive of all people from every walk of life --
to elect Kamala. We can’t do it without you. It’s just that simple.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/cnn-watch-party?refcode=ema190414-full&source=ema190414-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1003&akid=4341%2E5755789%2EvdnKVq ]Sign up now to host a watch party for Kamala’s upcoming CNN town hall,
and we’ll send you all the resources you need to host a successful event.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/cnn-watch-party?refcode=ema190414-full&source=ema190414-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1004&akid=4341%2E5755789%2EvdnKVq ]Host a watch party

In the coming months, the conversations you’ll have with voters in your
community are the conversations that will make the difference between
winning and losing. If you’re with Kamala, I can’t overstate how important
it is that you get involved with our organizing efforts.

Thanks, and I look forward to organizing with you!

— Jose Nunez
Digital Organizing Director
Kamala 2020

town hall, that’s totally ok. Can we count on you to add
a donation to help support our
efforts? Every dollar you give will help us provide resources like
trainings, guides, and tools to our volunteers across the country:

name: Cory Booker
subject: When I was mayor, we didn't wait for change
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, When I moved to Newark over two decades ago, the city quickly humbled me. I met an incredible woman named Virginia Jones, the tenant president in the projects where I lived, and got to see up close the promise of this city alongside very real pain. Ms. Jones showed me that Newark didn't need saving -- it was the rest of the nation that needed help to see the goodness of our community. "The world you see outside of you is a reflection of what you have inside of you," she would say to me. If you only see darkness in everything, that's all there will ever be. She'd say that the way to overcome economic insecurity, gun violence, corruption, and failing education systems, is to always push forward with relentless determination. And with this in mind, I was able to be part of a community of activists already working to change their circumstances and transform our city. And together, we achieved a lot. **Living and working in this city is how I know that we can achieve things others thought were impossible, but only if we work together.[_Join me in this effort to reignite our common purpose in America -- chip in whatever you can today._](https://act.corybooker. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apr-em?refcode=em_fr_20190414_CB_20190414-fr-CB-mayor-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Looking around at our campaign kickoff event yesterday, I couldn't help but think about how far we've come since I first arrived in this town. And how it serves as a model for what we can get done as a country. When I was mayor, we didn't wait for change -- we made it. Newark entered its largest period of economic growth since the 1960s. We built grocery stores in food deserts and businesses downtown. We took on slumlords and built real affordable housing options. We made ambitious changes to help our children get a better education and created and rejuvenated parks like the one in which we held yesterday's event. We did all of this in a community that knew that, in the words of Dr. King, "'wait' has almost always meant 'never.'" Wait for clean water. Wait for decent-paying jobs. Wait for better schools. Wait your turn. Wait. We refused to wait -- we did it together. **I know it might sound cheesy, but when I say love will win in 2020, I 'm speaking from experience.** I've seen it in action in a city with serious challenges and a lot of naysayers. I'm honored to play a small part in Newark's history. It's my daily reminder that the lines that divide us are nowhere near as strong as the ties that bind us. **And that's why I'm betting on strong, courageous love in this campaign. It 's what we need in order to obtain justice for all.** [_**The only way to go is together -- please join me and chip in today.**_](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apr-em?refcode=em_fr_20190414_CB_20190414-fr-CB-mayor-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Let's go, Cory [](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-apr-em?refcode=em_fr_20190414_CB_20190414-fr-CB-mayor-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7607/5fca0d19/1b227852/291a8ea3/3704902462/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7607/5fca0d19/1b227852/291a8ea2/3704902462/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc7607/5fca0d19/1b227852/291a8ea1/3704902462/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. name: BernieSanders.com
subject: We are under attack
body:
We did not think the first real attack would happen like this.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1038%2E150750%2E_8UM7T)

Sisters, Brothers, and Friends -
Just like that, our campaign is under attack from the corporate establishment.
This week, an organization that is the epitome of the political establishment — the Center for American Progress (CAP) — unleashed and promoted an online attack video against Bernie.
And behind the scenes on the day Bernie introduced his Medicare for All bill, they held a conference call with reporters attacking the bill.
That is the Center for American Progress’ real goal. Trying to stop Medicare for All and our progressive agenda.
CAP's leadership has been pretty upfront about their disdain for Bernie — and for all of us. They see our political revolution as a threat to their privilege and influence.
So today, we have to do something VERY important. We have to send a message that their attacks will only make our campaign stronger. And we have to do it in the language they understand best:
[**Make a $3 donation to our campaign today as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of deep-pocketed organizations working to defeat our progressive agenda. Every single donation sends a critical message.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10607?refcode=em190414-1-15&t=26&akid=1038%2E150750%2E_8UM7T)
The Center for American Progress is an organization whose massive annual budget is bankrolled by billionaires and corporate executives that profit from finance, pharmaceutical companies, fossil fuels, and sending American jobs overseas.
Last year alone, they took funding from financial giants like Bank of America and Blackstone, whose CEO was chair of Trump's business council and is a leading Republican donor.
Before that, they cashed checks from companies like BlueCross Blue Shield, Pfizer, WalMart, and defense contractors like General Dynamics and BAE Systems.
They also took hundreds of thousands of dollars from the fossil fuel pumping United Arab Emirates while the country was bombing innocent civilians in Yemen – a war Bernie has led the fight to end.
The Center for American Progress has deep connections to the economic and political elites who have done so much damage to working families in every zip code. And what we must do today is send a message that we are prepared to fight back against those who are working day and night to defeat our movement.
[**Contribute $3 today to send an unmistakable message that we will fight back against corporate-funded organizations that try to defeat our progressive agenda.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10607?refcode=em190414-1-15&t=27&akid=1038%2E150750%2E_8UM7T)
The establishment is panicked because together we are building a campaign that is on its way to winning the Democratic nomination, beating Trump and transforming America.
If we come together to show that we won’t tolerate their attacks, organizations like Center for American Progress will think twice before attacking our campaign again.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10607?refcode=em190414-1-15&t=28&akid=1038%2E150750%2E_8UM7T)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=1038%2E150750%2E_8UM7T). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=30&akid=1038%2E150750%2E_8UM7T). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=1038_150750__8UM7T&akid=1038%2E150750%2E_8UM7T).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=32&akid=1038%2E150750%2E_8UM7T).

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: A coward
body:
Donald Trump is a coward.
| | |
---
Peter,
Donald Trump is a coward.
He punches down and demeans the vulnerable. He demonizes women and people of color. He spews hate and division.
He has tried to reduce America to its smallest self by attacking the values and institutions of our democracy and turning our most cherished principles inside out. By encouraging bigotry, discrimination and violence, by closing our doors to immigrants and refugees, and by taking from the many to line the pockets of a few. He puts his name in bold on every building.
He does all of this because he wants us to believe he is powerful. He is not. He is weak.
**We deserve better.** We deserve a president brave enough to stand up for what's right and to take on the challenges that divide us. A president with the humility to admit when they're wrong, who doesn't run from progress but embraces it. We deserve a president who's not afraid of a fundamental truth: We are a better country when we care about one another.
I believe I can bring this country together. I am going to fight for every family in this country as hard as I would fight for my own. And with your help, I can run a campaign strong enough to defeat Donald Trump.
**[To get my message out there, we need to guarantee my spot on the Democratic debate stage. That starts with having 65,000 individual donors to this campaign--can you be one of them? Donate right now to help get me on the debate stage and support my vision for defeating Donald Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976ebe/2ae112ef/6ddc8a63/357df9d8/1151219168/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwNDgtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3048-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

I launched my campaign for president in front of Trump International three weeks ago because that tower is a shrine to greed, division and vanity--and those are the exact problems standing in the way of everything I believe in.
Our democracy has been taken out of the hands of the people and given over to special interests.
If you're not willing to get money out of politics and have publicly funded elections, greedy lobbyists will continue to control our lawmaking. If you're not willing to take on the drug companies, you can't solve the opioid crisis or bring down the cost of prescriptions. If you're not willing to take on the fossil fuel companies, you can't fight the effects of climate change and get to net-zero carbon emissions.
I believe, in my bones, that we can accomplish all this and more. And I know that years from now, we will look back on this moment in our history and be able to say we did something about it.
**If you 're with me, make a donation right now--every gift gets me closer to being on the Democratic debate stage where I can continue to share my brave vision for this country, and every gift goes toward helping me defeat Donald Trump:**

When people come together to drive out darkness, hope rises. Fear loses. And brave wins.
